mapper.select: SELECT u.id, u.provider, u.provider_user_id, u.nickname, u.bio, u.profile_image_url, u.status, u.refresh_token, u.refresh_token_expires_at, u.last_login_at, u.created_at, u.updated_at, u.location_id, l.si_do, l.si_gun_gu FROM users u LEFT JOIN locations l ON l.id = u.location_id WHERE u.provider = #{provider} AND u.provider_user_id = #{providerUserId}

SELECT u.id, u.provider, u.provider_user_id, u.nickname, u.bio, u.profile_image_url, u.status, u.refresh_token, u.refresh_token_expires_at, u.last_login_at, u.created_at, u.updated_at, u.location_id, l.si_do, l.si_gun_gu FROM users u LEFT JOIN locations l ON l.id = u.location_id WHERE u.id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO users (provider, provider_user_id, status) VALUES (#{provider}, #{providerUserId}, #{status})
mapper.update: UPDATE users SET refresh_token = NULL, refresh_token_expires_at = NULL WHERE id = #{id}
